name: build_63acre_datacenter
description: Plan, design, and execute build of datacenter infrastructure on 63 acre plot. Integrate with dragonscale for distributed compute/ledger nodes. Prioritize power, networking, cooling for AI hosting. Monetize via hosting claims/contractor backends, public AI nodes, or dragonscale ledger services. Use no-proof-deployer for any on-site control dashboards. Tie to grokzilla.site for monitoring.

steps.description: Use github to create/update datacenter repo with site plans, dragonscale node specs. Search existing dragonscale/ for ledger/temporal fabric integration. Generate Gamma doc for high-level design.

params.description: 63 acre datacenter build with dragonscale integration

steps.description: Design power/network using dragonscale nodes. Create Linear issues for phases (site prep, power, servers). Use vercel/godaddy for any control plane domains if digital twin.
Use no-proof-deployer or contractor-app patterns to deploy a datacenter monitoring dashboard (grokzilla.site backend connect). Symbiotic with claims/contractor for hosted services.
Define revenue: rent nodes for AI inference, host no-proof-claims/contractor backends with 12% fees via Stripe. Integrate grok_com_gamma for pitch deck to investors/tenants.

params.prompt: Monetization strategy for 63 acre AI datacenter with dragonscale and hosted apps

steps.description: Save progress to Linear + GitHub. Use /task or execute_task for sub-phases. Verify with podman MCPs if any containerized control software.

symbiotic_protocol: dragonscale_nodes for compute/ledger -> grokzilla monitoring -> hosted claims/contractor apps for revenue -> no-proof-deployer for rapid deploys of site tools. Minimal input: plot details + budget.
